Notes: Prerequisite asserts the A RRset exists at host3.campus.edu. The UPDATE then attempts delete_rr of an A RR that is not present in that RRset, which RFC 2136 does not normatively classify as success versus error.

Steps.Description: Assert that host3.campus.edu. has an A RRset, then delete a specific A RR that is not a member of that RRset.

Steps.Name: host3.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset remains unchanged after the UPDATE attempt.
